master_row.title: Hamiltonian
master_row.canonical_statement: \begin{theorem}[Helicity Conservation] The total magnetic helicity \begin{equation} \mathcal{H}_{total} = \mathcal{H}_{classical} + \mathcal{H}_{rotating} + \mathcal{H}_{quantum} + \mathcal{H}_{photon} \end{equation} is conserved under ideal MHD evolution: \begin{equation} \frac{d\mathcal{H}_{total}}{dt} = 0 \end{equation} \end{theorem}
master_row.formation_inputs: H, c, l, a, s, r
master_row.formation_note: Recovered from a D:\All source document under ‘Magnetic Helicity Conservation’.
master_row.dictionary: Hamiltonian — H_total = H_classical + H_rotating + H_quantum + H_photon
master_row.encyclopedia: The entry preserves the equation exactly as extracted from `00_Engine\Lemma-Maker\Prism\topological_quantum_storage_paper.tex` for registry alignment and later derivation.
